author: lukaszrozmej
content:
We are looking into integrations and standards for guest program.

Is my understand correct: 
1. For I/O and precompiles this is the spec (at least the start): https://github.com/eth-act/zkvm-standards , but no one really implements them yet?
2. For data format this is the spec: https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/pull/2213 ? Additional question here - what will be the format of the data given to guest program? Will it be json? That seems awfully wasteful...
